title: Fix: SQL injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed SQL injection vulnerability in user authentication. Implemented parameterized queries for all database operations. Added input validation and sanitization. Implemented ORM with safe query building. Added security audit for SQL injection. Result: SQL injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_body_lines: - Implement parameterized queries for database operations
- Implement ORM with safe query building
- Add security audit for SQL injection
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix SQL injection vulnerability"
